Lore category

People

Source-linked people records in the Raigulus Division Lore Archive.

12structured records

person

Aaron Keener

A first-wave Division Agent who went rogue and became the central target of the Warlords of New York manhunt.

not applicablesource reviewed

person

Andrew Ellis

The former Speaker who becomes President during the crisis, is rescued from the True Sons and is later exposed as a Black Tusk collaborator.

not applicablesource reviewed

person

Emeline Shaw

The Outcasts' leader, pursued from Roosevelt Island to a final confrontation at Manning National Zoo.

not applicablesource reviewed

person

Faye Lau

A Division Agent whose appearance in the early Division 2 recap demonstrates the restored SHD Network reconnecting Agents across the country.

not applicablesource reviewed

person

Gordon Amherst

The virologist identified by the Division as the creator of Green Poison.

not applicablesource reviewed

person

James Dragov

A rogue lieutenant of Aaron Keener who leads the Rikers sub-group operating in Lower Manhattan.

not applicablesource reviewed

person

Jessica Kandel

A doctor and surviving scientist involved in the nationwide effort to create a broad-spectrum antiviral.

not applicablesource reviewed

person

Joe Ferro

The original leader of the Cleaners, who made fire the faction's method for eliminating Green Poison.

not applicablesource reviewed

person

Larae Barrett

The former Rikers leader whose death leaves the faction leaderless and divided into multiple sub-groups.

not applicablesource reviewed

person

Rick Valassi

A reporter and broadcaster who remains on the air after the events of the first game.

not applicablesource reviewed

person

Vitaly Tchernenko

A Russian virologist pursued by multiple factions because his expertise could support mass production of a broad-spectrum antiviral.

not applicablesource reviewed

person

Vivian Conley

The Cleaner leader in Warlords of New York and one of Aaron Keener's four lieutenants.

not applicablesource reviewed

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
